issues: The subject scale is slightly above the target range but still acceptable.

attempt_history.retry_prompt_addendum: Maintain the single dark navy/charcoal ink family with scratchy thin-to-medium jittery strokes and visible construction marks. Ensure the subject scale remains close to 0.28 and negative space around 0.55. Add subtle background elements like sticky notes and a small whiteboard to better match the article grounding. Keep the monitor content rough and pseudo-code-like without adding logos or branding.
